title: STDDEV function not support inf, -inf and Nan
description:
### What happens?

DuckDB's STDDEV function does not support Infinity, -Infinity, or NaN for columns of type DOUBLE or FLOAT.

```
D select * from test;
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  name   в”Ӯ value  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ varchar в”Ӯ double в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ test2   в”Ӯ    inf в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ test1   в”Ӯ  123.0 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ test3   в”Ӯ  123.0 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ test3   в”Ӯ    nan в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ name3   в”Ӯ   -inf в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

D select ROUND(STDDEV_POP("value"), 2) from test;
Out of Range Error: STDDEV_POP is out of range!
```

### To Reproduce

Step1:
```
create table test(
        name VARCHAR,
        value DOUBLE,
  );
```

Step2:
```
insert into test values('test', 123);
insert into test values('test1', 'Nan');
insert into test values('test2', 'Infinity');
insert into test values('test3', '-Infinity');
```

Step3:
```
select STDDEV_POP("value") from test;
select STDDEV("value") from test;
select STDDEV_SAMP("value") from test;
```

### OS:

MacOS & Linux

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.2 & 1.1.3

### DuckDB Client:

Python

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Lucas

### Affiliation:

Beijing Institute of Technology

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a stable release

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_inf_nan(name VARCHAR, value DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_inf_nan VALUES('test2', CAST('Infinity' AS DOUBLE));
INSERT INTO test_inf_nan VALUES('test3', CAST('NaN' AS DOUBLE));
key_bug_features: STDDEV function fails with Infinity, -Infinity, or NaN
